<a id="research-ideation"></a>
# 💡 Research Ideation

> Systems focused on generating research questions, hypotheses, directions, or project ideas.

## What belongs here

- the main output is ideas, hypotheses, or proposals

## Exclude if

- the main contribution is literature synthesis, experimentation, or full-pipeline execution
